programs.name: Modern Software and AI Engineering (Scaler Academy)
programs.audience: Working professionals; segmented 1-4 yrs (SDEs, QA, frontend devs), 2-6 yrs (fullstack/backend), 3-8 yrs (senior engineers, tech leads), 5-10+ yrs (solution engineers, AI-first builders)
programs.fee: Rs 3,99,000 total; starting at Rs 9,791/month with Rs 20,000 upfront
programs.format: Online live sessions plus recorded content; lifetime access to curriculum, recordings and future updates; next cohort July 2026

programs.name: Modern Data Science and ML with Specialisation in AI (Scaler DSML)
programs.audience: 0-4 yrs (SDEs, QA, analysts, non-tech graduates) through 4-10+ yrs (mid-level professionals)
programs.fee: Rs 3,99,000 total; EMI from Rs 9,791/month; Rs 20,000 upfront commitment
programs.format: Live online classes roughly 3x per week with recorded access; next cohort July 2026

programs.name: Advanced AI & Machine Learning With Agentic AI
programs.duration: 15 months (Beginner track, new to ML/Python); 12 months (Advanced track, coding experience)
programs.audience: 1-2 yrs (freshers, switchers), 2-4 yrs (SDEs, backend, QA), 3-6 yrs (ML/data engineers), 4-8 yrs (senior engineers, architects), 3-10+ yrs (PMs, consultants)
programs.fee: Rs 3,99,000 total; Rs 9,791/month; no-cost EMI with Rs 20,000 upfront commitment
programs.format: Online live classes with lifetime access to curriculum, recordings and future updates; next cohort July 2026

programs.name: DevOps, Cloud & AI Platform Engineering
programs.audience: 0-3 yrs through 12+ yrs; specializations in MLOps and Cybersecurity
programs.fee: Rs 3,99,000 total; starting Rs 9,791/month; no-cost EMI with Rs 20,000 upfront
programs.format: Online with live sessions, recorded content, lifetime access; next cohort July 2026

programs.name: AI Engineering Course with Gen AI & LLMs, Certification by IIT Roorkee CEC
programs.audience: Software developers (1-4 yrs), data scientists (2-6 yrs), DevOps engineers (3-8 yrs), other tech professionals (3-10+ yrs)
programs.fee: Rs 76,699 total (incl. taxes); starting at Rs 8,303/month with flexible EMI
programs.format: Online with optional 2-day campus immersion at IIT Roorkee; certificate by IIT Roorkee Continuing Education Centre

ai_curriculum.detail: Four blocks: LLMs & prompt engineering (how models work, reliable prompting, evaluation & safety); RAG, research & no-code apps (grounded Q&A, chatbots, multimodal generation); Automation & agents (n8n, Zapier, MCP, agent building, multi-agent systems); Ship it (system design, observability, deploying live AI apps incl. AWS)

ai_curriculum.module: ML & Gen AI Engineering (7 months total)
ai_curriculum.detail: MLOps, System Design, Foundations of AI Engineering & RAG Systems (vector databases, embeddings), Agentic Design Patterns & Multi-Agent Orchestration (LangChain, LangGraph, memory systems), Advanced Cognitive Architectures & Multimodal Intelligence (Agentic RAG, GraphRAG), Fine tuning, LLMOps and Security (PEFT, LoRA, vLLM, quantization, token economics)

ai_curriculum.module: ML Coding / Applied AI-ML (5 months, 22 topics)
ai_curriculum.detail: Regression, classification, unsupervised learning, time series, recommenders, deep learning, computer vision, NLP incl. Transformers/GPT, LSTM, RNN, Attention, Transfer Learning

ai_curriculum.module: Data Foundations (1 month) + Maths for ML (1 month)
ai_curriculum.detail: NumPy, Pandas, EDA, visualization, probability; vectors, hyperplanes, loss minimization, gradient descent

8 listed projects incl.: RAG-Powered Knowledge Assistant (NotebookLM, Dify, Render, Railway); Domain-Specific RAG System (Milvus, Hugging Face, Opik, semantic chunking, hallucination guardrails); LLM Fine-Tuning with LoRA (Hugging Face TRL, PEFT, PyTorch); No-Code AI Agent with Tool Use (n8n, Relevance AI); Real-Time Fraud Detection (Kafka, AutoEncoders); LinkedIn Newsfeed Personalization (TensorFlow Ranking, BERT)

Prompt Engineering - Anatomy to Advanced Patterns; Knowledge Management & RAG in Practice; What Is an AI Agent? Concepts & Live Demos; Claude Ecosystem Deep-Dive - Skills, Artifacts, claude.md; Deploying AI Apps - Hosting & Going Live

ai_curriculum.module: Scaler Academy AI content (software engineering program)
ai_curriculum.detail: AI & Agents: Building Autonomous Systems (1 month); Intermediate DSA: AI-Assisted Problem Solving (1 month); FDE track with RAG + Consulting (1 month, 12 sessions); CRM-to-AI Support Copilot project using agents, MCP, human-in-the-loop approval
DSA for Professionals (4-6 months), Advanced ML & Deep Learning 1-2 (2 months), Big Data (recorded, 1 month), Reinforcement Learning (recorded, 1 month)

outcomes.claim: Scaler FAQ page: 93.5% success rate amongst students who successfully completed the program; highest package INR 1.7 crore per annum; average salary Rs 21.6 LPA; median salary hike 150%; and explicitly: 'Job placements are not guaranteed'

Scaler placement review page: 89% placement rate, average post-Scaler salary Rs 23 LPA, 147% avg salary increment, 1200+ hiring partners, 11,000+ placements. NOTE: these figures differ from the FAQ page's figures - quote with attribution to the specific page, never as one definitive number
Named hiring companies on placement review page: Google, Amazon, Microsoft, Flipkart, Adobe, Fractal, Paytm plus 1200+ more
DSML course page: 900+ hiring partners, median salary hike ~110% for data science, 40,000+ peers alumni network
Placement support eligibility is conditional: finish all modules, meet attendance minimums, submit capstone projects; support continues 6-12 months after the course; no minimum salary guaranteed

Named alumni examples (AI/ML page): Shivam Prakash (Ericsson Backend Engineer to Adobe Computer Scientist, 3 offers), Rajesh Somasundaram (HERE Technologies SWE-II to NinjaCart MLOps Engineer-2), Divyanshu Tanter (Wipro Data Scientist to Dassault Systemes AI Researcher, 4 offers), Sayyam Bhandari (Sr BI Analyst to Amazon Data Engineer, 2 offers)

instructors.name: Anshuman Singh
instructors.credential: Co-Founder Scaler; two-time ACM ICPC World Finalist; built Facebook Messenger; 15+ YOE; teaches Problem Solving & System Design

instructors.name: Shivank Agarwal
instructors.credential: SVP Engineering Scaler; ex SDE Manager at Microsoft; 14+ YOE; System Design & Backend

instructors.name: Shivam Prasad
instructors.credential: Principal Data Scientist, Omsha; production deep learning across CV/NLP/speech, research at IISc; 10+ YOE; MLOps & Computer Vision

instructors.name: Akash Rajpuria
instructors.credential: Senior Data Scientist (NLP), EPAM; Interspeech 2021 published researcher; built BERT-powered search at Pfizer; 8+ YOE

instructors.name: Saurabh Kango
instructors.credential: Senior Manager DS&A, Meesho; ex-LinkedIn Analytics Lead and Airbnb Data Scientist; 10+ YOE

instructors.name: Umang Agarwal (SDE-II Amazon), Subham Soni (SWE Microsoft), Kunal Jindal (SDE-II Atlassian), Alok Singh (SDE-2 Booking.com)
instructors.credential: Current working engineers teaching DSA/Backend/System Design on Scaler Academy

instructors.name: Pravendra Singh
instructors.credential: Professor, IIT Roorkee; 15+ YOE in deep learning/LLMs; instructor on the IIT Roorkee AI Engineering course

financing.detail: Zero-interest EMI up to 24 months; Rs 3,99,000 programs start at Rs 9,791/month with Rs 20,000 upfront commitment
36-month loan tenure available with interest included (not zero-cost)
Scholarships based on entrance test scores; merit scholarships up to Rs 25,000 mentioned
Full opt-out with refund by emailing refund@scaler.com within 14 days from first class; processed within 30 days; no refunds after the window
Program can be paused up to 3 times before completing core modules; paused learners keep recordings and doubt resolution access

entrance_test.fact: Free 30-minute entrance test of MCQs: logical reasoning and aptitude, basic mathematics, basic time complexity, predicting outputs of small code snippets. FAQ: 'you do not need any special preparation for this test'. Scholarships available based on test scores
Eligibility per FAQ: only working professionals with a minimum of 1 year of experience are eligible for the upskilling programs (final-year students should confirm eligibility with an advisor)
Scaler NSET is a SEPARATE test for the 4-year undergraduate School of Technology program only - retake rules published for NSET (thrice per academic year) do not apply to the upskilling entrance test

vs_free_content.argument: Site's own framing vs free content: creating a path, right mentorship, opening opportunities vs unstructured YouTube; peer pods for accountability; multiple mock interview rounds, resume support, LinkedIn optimization; job portal with assessed openings; lifetime alumni community
1:1 mentorship from active industry professionals who are currently employed and currently hiring; ~2 mentor sessions per month, 30-60 min 1:1 video calls
Lifetime access: 'AI built into every module, not bolted on after' and 'Curriculum updates forever - no extra cost'
Proprietary practice environment: Scaler-built coding platform with terminal-based judges and AI mock interviews; 37,000+ member community
Structured live format: live classes ~2x per week (late evening weekdays), all recorded, ~15 hour weekly commitment expected

gaps: Placement statistics are inconsistent across Scaler's own pages (89% vs 93.5% rate; Rs 21.6 vs Rs 23 LPA average; 147% vs 150% vs 126% hike; 650+ vs 900+ vs 1200+ partners). Never quote one number as definitive; attribute each figure to its page
NO job or placement guarantee exists - FAQ explicitly says 'Job placements are not guaranteed'; no minimum salary guaranteed. Never imply otherwise
No publication date or audit methodology for placement stats; unclear which cohorts they cover
No ISA (income share agreement) exists on scaler.com - do not claim one
Whether the Rs 20,000 upfront commitment is refundable within the 14-day window is not explicitly stated
Retake policy for the 30-minute upskilling entrance test is not published
Exact interest rates, lending partners, eligibility criteria for 36-month loans not published
Cohort composition (batch size, peer experience mix, acceptance rate) is not published
Weekly schedule inconsistency: FAQ says ~2x/week, DSML page suggests ~3x/week
Whether final-year students (0 YoE) are eligible for upskilling programs is unclear - FAQ says minimum 1 year experience required; an advisor must confirm options for freshers
Scholarship amounts beyond 'up to Rs 25,000' not published
Scaler certificates are completion certificates, not degrees; only the IIT Roorkee course carries external CEC certification - never claim university accreditation for Academy/DSML/DevOps

Market statistics on program pages (163% growth in AI postings, ~70 LPA GenAI salaries, $206K US averages) are third-party market claims Scaler cites, NOT Scaler outcome data - never present them as Scaler results
Alumni network size quoted variously as 37,000+, 40,000+, 1,00,000+ on different pages
No published list of which companies are formal hiring partners vs where alumni happen to work
Time-to-placement not guaranteed; placement page mentions cases taking up to six months post-graduation
Named instructors are marketing examples; lineup per cohort is not guaranteed
SST/SSB are certificate programs by their own disclaimers - NEVER call them degrees, MBA, or university programs; the parallel IIT Madras/BITS degrees are separate, optional, and separately paid
SST: no placement guarantee published, only internship stats and individual PPO figures; batch size, audit methodology, loan terms, Year-4 accommodation not published
SSB: '100% placement rate' is a founding-cohort claim with no methodology or base size; absolute salary figures not published; batch size, hostel costs, tuition refund policy not published
SSB pages conflict on application fee (Rs 1,500 on admission page vs Rs 2,000-4,000 intake tiers in FAQ) and batch start (August 2026 vs September 18, 2026) - attribute per page, don't pick one

sst.fact: Scaler School of Technology (SST): 4-year undergraduate residential program in Bengaluru, two tracks: Computer Science & AI, and AI & Business. Includes 50+ projects and a mandatory 1-year industry immersion

CRITICAL credential fact, site's own disclaimer: 'Scaler School of Technology offers a certificate-based program. It is not a university/college and does not confer degrees.' Students may separately pursue a parallel UGC-recognised BS from IIT Madras (Rs 3.52 lakh) or BITS Pilani (Rs 4.59 lakh), paid separately to those universities

SST fees: CS & AI total Rs 22.99 lakh (Rs 50,000 admission + Rs 17 lakh tuition + Rs 5.49 lakh hostel & mess over 3 years); AI & Business total Rs 24.49 lakh; Rs 25,000 refundable security deposit; NSET application fee Rs 1,000

NSET admission test: 120-minute online test (Mathematics + Logical Reasoning), up to 3 attempts per year, score determines admission AND scholarship. Eligibility: under 20 years as of July 1 2026, 60%+ in Class XII Maths. Two interview rounds after (Round 1 with an 'AI version of Anshuman Singh'). Fastrack skip-NSET: JEE Mains 92%ile+ overall or 95%ile+ in Maths/Physics, or SAT 1430+
SST scholarships up to 100%: Merit-Based and Merit-cum-Need-Based; 100% for IMO/IOI international representatives, 50% for INMO/INOI winners
SST Year 1 curriculum (CS & AI): Python, Java, DSA, HTML/CSS/JS, React, Statistics & Probability, AI/ML, Database Design; projects include AI Tic-Tac-Toe, mini Canva-like editor, IPL prediction

SST published outcomes: '96.3% of eligible students got at least 1 internship offer', 158 first-batch internships, highest internship stipend Rs 2 lakh/month, individual PPOs listed at 46/44/38/30 LPA, 150+ companies. No batch-wide average placement salary published

ssb.fact: Scaler School of Business (SSB): PGP in Management & Tech (PGP-MT), 18 months full-time in Bengaluru incl. 3-6 month internship. 6 terms of 3 months: Terms 1-3 core, Term 4 core+electives, Term 5 electives, Term 6 industry specialization. 22 core courses, 20 functional electives, 4 industry specializations

CRITICAL credential fact, site's own disclaimer: 'Scaler School of Business offers a certificate-based program. It is not a university/college and does not confer degrees.' The credential is a certificate for PGP in Management and Technology - not an MBA, no UGC/AICTE recognition claimed

SSB fee: Rs 23,00,000. Financing via bank/NBFC partners; NO zero-cost EMI offered. Scholarships (tuition only): Future Business Innovators, Extraordinary Achievements, Industry Leaders, Women in Leadership categories

SSB admission: profile-based (bachelor's degree, graduation 2016-2026), video essay, interview with case study discussion. No GMAT/GRE/CAT required, no age limit. Freshers with strong projects/internships welcome, 1+ year experience described as ideal

SSB program components: launch 3 AI products, build 2 real businesses, 10+ company-sourced projects, 150+ hours of AI learning with 25+ tools, D2C Startup Challenge with Rs 25,000 funding, Hustle Program with Rs 50,000 funding

SSB founding-cohort claims: '40 placements and 5 entrepreneurs', '3.2x average salary hike', '100% placement rate', internships at Razorpay, MPL, BharatPe, Spotdraft etc., Rs 40,000 median internship stipend. No absolute average/median CTC published, no guarantee terms
